title: Daily Million-Visitor Autonomous Workflow
daily_steps: 3. Check indexing status and discovered-not-indexed trend
5. Check production queue (how many pages allowed today?)
7. Improve existing pages (max 3/day, skip Phase 31 hold pages until Jun 24)
8. Add internal links (new pages → parent, parent → top children)
9. Update data hub (if new data asset this week)
13. Report measurable movement (actual numbers, not activity)
cost: USD 0 — all tools free and open-source
